viking

A fictional settlement hidden along the rocky coastline of western Norway, circa 845 C.E. Concealed by a dense, ancient pine forest, Vargheim is a place whispered about in nearby villages вЂ” a haven for outcasts, berserkers, and the battle-worn.

Founded by those banished from other clans, Vargheim thrives in its seclusion. Its people revere Odin in his most wrathful and warlike forms, favoring chaos, cunning, and strength. Raiding is not only a way of life, but a sacred rite. Many warriors vanish into the woods for years, honing their minds and bodies before joining seaborne assaults.
